prompt: Create a dynamic cinematic digital illustration of a mountain biker racing downhill through a tunnel-like canyon of dense abstract flower petals and rounded foliage shapes. Use an extreme low-angle wide shot from directly in front of the bike, with the oversized front tire dominating the lower center foreground and the rider leaning aggressively forward over the handlebars. The rider wears a sleek full-face helmet with a black reflective visor, a fitted futuristic cycling suit in hot pink, coral, and deep navy, gloves, and protective gear. Surround the scene with thick walls of stylized petals and leaf silhouettes in vivid pink, red, coral, orange, and white, forming a rushing corridor that suggests speed and motion. Add large blurred foreground petal shapes on the left and right edges for depth, dark navy shadow shapes for contrast, and a warm peach-orange glowing background at the vanishing point. The style should be highly aesthetic, bold, graphic, semi-abstract, with smooth vector-like shapes, painterly gradients, dramatic foreshortening, high saturation, strong rim lighting, motion energy, and no visible text.
